falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (previous month's high) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above key resistance would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern and indicate a bullish trend contrary to the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Bitcoin's 30-day trading volume exceeds 200% of its 2023 average daily volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volume surge would indicate a fundamental shift in market dynamics, contradicting the pattern's implied stagnation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score surpasses 60 (current score: 39) with a 50%+ increase in volatility
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding this threshold would indicate a market phase fundamentally different from the 2024 August bottom pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
